# Repospec example — demo-service

The minimal result of `repospec init` for a service, committed as living
documentation and a fixture.

```bash
repospec init --yes \
  --name demo-service \
  --description "An example service generated by repospec init." \
  --type service \
  --languages typescript \
  --adapters claude,agents
```

- `.repospec/` — the human-owned source of truth: `project.yaml`, the three prose
  documents (`constitution.md`, `architecture.md`, `workflow.md`), and starter
  `agents/` and `rules/`.
- `CLAUDE.md`, `AGENTS.md` — generated entrypoints with a managed header
  (ADR-0004); regenerate with `repospec sync`, don't hand-edit.

For a richer example (six roles, billing rules, a declared plugin) see
[`../acme-billing`](../acme-billing).
